goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should 'leave after 12:15' and should go to 'cambridge'.
The train should leave on 'thursday' and should depart from 'london liverpool street'.
Make sure you get 'arrival time' and 'train ID'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the 'north' and should be in the 'moderate' price range.
The hotel should have 'a star of 4' and should be in the type of 'guesthouse'.
Make sure you get 'whether they have free parking', 'phone number', and 'whether they have internet'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should leave after 12:15 and should go to cambridge
The train should leave on thursday and should depart from london liverpool street
Make sure you get arrival time and train ID
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the north and should be in the moderate price range
The hotel should have a star of 4 and should be in the type of guesthouse
Make sure you get whether they have free parking, phone number, and whether they have internet
